title: Links must have discernible text
summary: Give every link discernible, descriptive text (or an aria-label for icon links).

code.title: Links must have discernible text
code.summary: Give every link discernible, descriptive text (or an aria-label for icon links).
code.what_changed: Give every link discernible, descriptive text (or an aria-label for icon links).

improvement_summary: The redesigned version fixes 'Links must have discernible text'. Give every link discernible, descriptive text (or an aria-label for icon links). This addresses a serious barrier and improves conformance with WCAG 2.4.4.
highlights: Resolves a serious issue mapped to WCAG 2.4.4
